caption: In a spacious indoor hall with a blue floor and a ceiling featuring large chandeliers, several men perform coordinated martial arts movements. Most of the performers wear traditional white uniforms, while one central figure wears a blue outfit and another wears a black outfit. In the early stages of the sequence, the men stand in a loose formation; the man in blue moves forward while those in white and black maintain their positions. As the sequence progresses, the men execute synchronized high kicks, with the man in blue and a man in white kicking their legs upward simultaneously. By the end of the clip, the group transitions into a different stance, shifting their weight and lowering their center of gravity. A crowd of spectators sits in the background, watching the demonstration from a dimmed area of the hall.
